title: The new Item ID column - feedback
excerpt:
Amazing progress with the Item ID column, now that it is possible to customize it with a prefix text and leading zeroes.

posts.author: yossir.rousso (Yossi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Amazing progress with the Item ID column, now that it is possible to customize it with a prefix text and leading zeroes.
On think I’m missing is the ability to provide a starting number. Currently when you add the column to any working board, the enumeration starts from 1. It sould have been useful to be able to mark another starting point, e.g. 21.
Another nice ability would be to allow changing the item id number manually after created, and also to check if a duplicate doesn’t already exist.

posts.author: HayleyTaylor (Hayley Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree with this. We are wanting to use the ID to replace another system which generates ID’s that are 5 characters in length. We want to pick-up where that system left off in terms of the ID number we begin with on Monday.com, and keep the 5 character ID for ease of reference.
